probes.name: auth-db-writable
probes.description: auth_refresh_tokens + auth_password_resets + auth_email_verifications + auth_mfa_challenges + auth_cross_app_grants + auth_jwt_deny_list + auth_jwt_signing_keys all writable. Performs no-op INSERT + ROLLBACK on each table to verify DDL / DML privileges. Boot aborts on failure — auth is a write-heavy substrate.

probes.name: auth-schema-current
probes.description: Every auth-owned table has the columns the module expects. Catches unmigrated environments before they crash on first login.

probes.name: auth-redis-reachable
probes.description: Redis reachable for MFA challenge state (idn:mfa_challenge:*), rate-limit buckets (idn:rate_limit_login:*), and JWKS cache. Boot aborts on failure — the module cannot serve login without Redis.

probes.name: auth-jwt-signing-key-reachable
probes.description: At least ONE active signing key exists AND its ciphertext decrypts successfully via the configured KMS/Vault backend. Failure blocks new JWT issuance; existing verifications continue via cached JWKS. Sustained unavailability blocks new sessions.

probes.name: auth-jwks-response-cacheable
probes.description: The /.well-known/jwks.json endpoint responds within 100ms + has Cache-Control per auth.jwt.jwks_cache_control. Slower responses indicate signing_keys table needs an index tune.

probes.name: auth-kms-reachable
probes.description: KMS reachable for signing-key decryption. Alias of the identity-kms-reachable probe on the auth-service side (the identity substrate cares about MFA-secret KMS; the auth module cares about JWT-signing-key KMS).

probes.name: auth-refresh-purge-scheduler-alive
probes.description: PurgeExpiredRefreshTokensJob has run within the last 2 hours. Missed runs risk unbounded auth_refresh_tokens growth.

probes.name: auth-mfa-challenge-purge-scheduler-alive
probes.description: PurgeExpiredMfaChallengesJob has run within the last 10 minutes. Missed runs risk unbounded MFA-challenge growth (short TTL, high volume).

probes.name: auth-jwt-rotation-current
probes.description: Every Application (and the global slot) has a signing key rotated within the last 45 days. Missed rotations indicate the monthly RotateJwtSigningKeyJob is stuck.

probes.name: auth-deny-list-size-bounded
probes.description: auth_jwt_deny_list has fewer than 100K rows. Larger indicates PurgeExpiredJwtDenyListJob is behind OR mass revocation event ongoing.
